species: Molecular identification based on calmodulin gene sequencing identified three species of tannase-producing black aspergilli: Aspergillus luchuensis, A. niger (formerly A. welwitschiae), and A. uvarum.
sample_source: compost, black tea waste, and soil rich in decomposing vegetation
Fungi were isolated from ten samples, including compost, black tea waste, and soil rich in decomposing vegetation...
cell_line: The isolate A. uvarum HT4 exhibited the highest extracellular tannase activity...
strain: The isolate A. uvarum HT4 exhibited the highest extracellular tannase activity...
